assertions.reason: A fresh localhost page load completed well under the target, with HTML/render metrics under 1 second and full load under 3 seconds.
evidence: Navigation timing reported responseStart=2.0ms, domInteractive=4.8ms, domContentLoaded=79.5ms, and loadEventEnd=413.2ms.
After load, clicking the Watchlist control immediately opened the Watchlist panel, confirming the page was interactive within the measured load window.

interactiveChecks.action: Opened http://localhost:5173/ in a fresh browser session and waited for network idle.
interactiveChecks.observed: The map shell rendered with live stats and the flat-map view selected.

interactiveChecks.action: Clicked the Watchlist button after the initial load completed.
interactiveChecks.observed: A Watchlist panel appeared, showing the root view was interactive immediately after load.
